endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.CustomerLockbox/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all the available REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.CustomerLockbox/requests
endpoints.description: Lists all of the Lockbox requests in the given subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.CustomerLockbox/requests/{requestId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{REQUESTID}} with a real requestid.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.CustomerLockbox/requests/{requestId}/UpdateApproval
endpoints.description: Update Customer Lockbox request approval status API
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{REQUESTID}} with a real requestid.
